सामवेद — Samaveda

The Samaveda is codified in two parts: Pūrvārcika (mantras 1–650) and Uttarārcika (mantras 651–1875), a symphony of mantric songs celebrating Agni, Indra and Soma as reflections of the One Supreme Divinity.

ओ३म्
सत्यं वद । धर्मं चर ।
ओ३म्

आर्य समाज
